python.name: ruff:mcpgateway
cmd: FILES=$(git diff --name-only $(git merge-base HEAD origin/main)...HEAD 2>/dev/null | grep -E '^mcpgateway/.*\.py$' | tr '\n' ' '); [ -z "$FILES" ] && echo 'No changed Python files — skipping ruff' && exit 0; echo "Running ruff on: $FILES"; uv run ruff check $FILES

python.name: ruff:plugins
cmd: FILES=$(git diff --name-only $(git merge-base HEAD origin/main)...HEAD 2>/dev/null | grep -E '^plugins/.*\.py$' | tr '\n' ' '); [ -z "$FILES" ] && echo 'No changed Python files — skipping ruff' && exit 0; echo "Running ruff on: $FILES"; uv run ruff check $FILES

python.name: autoflake
python.description: Remove unused imports and variables on changed .py files
cmd: FILES=$(git diff --name-only $(git merge-base HEAD origin/main)...HEAD 2>/dev/null | grep -E '^(mcpgateway|plugins)/.*\.py$' | tr '\n' ' '); [ -z "$FILES" ] && echo 'No changed Python files — skipping autoflake' && exit 0; echo "Running autoflake on: $FILES"; uv run autoflake --check --remove-all-unused-imports --remove-unused-variables --remove-duplicate-keys --ignore-init-module-imports $FILES

python.name: black:check
python.description: Black formatter check on changed .py files (mcpgateway/ plugins/)
cmd: FILES=$(git diff --name-only $(git merge-base HEAD origin/main)...HEAD 2>/dev/null | grep -E '^(mcpgateway|plugins)/.*\.py$' | tr '\n' ' '); [ -z "$FILES" ] && echo 'No changed Python files — skipping black' && exit 0; echo "Running black on: $FILES"; uv run black --check $FILES

python.name: isort:check
python.description: Import order check on changed .py files (mcpgateway/ plugins/)
cmd: FILES=$(git diff --name-only $(git merge-base HEAD origin/main)...HEAD 2>/dev/null | grep -E '^(mcpgateway|plugins)/.*\.py$' | tr '\n' ' '); [ -z "$FILES" ] && echo 'No changed Python files — skipping isort' && exit 0; echo "Running isort on: $FILES"; uv run isort --check --profile=black $FILES

python.name: bandit
python.description: Bandit security scan on changed .py files (mcpgateway/)
cmd: FILES=$(git diff --name-only $(git merge-base HEAD origin/main)...HEAD 2>/dev/null | grep -E '^mcpgateway/.*\.py$' | tr '\n' ' '); [ -z "$FILES" ] && echo 'No changed Python files — skipping bandit' && exit 0; echo "Running bandit on: $FILES"; uv run bandit $FILES -lll --confidence-level high

python.name: flake8:mcpgateway
python.description: Flake8 PEP-8 / logic errors on changed .py files (mcpgateway/)
cmd: FILES=$(git diff --name-only $(git merge-base HEAD origin/main)...HEAD 2>/dev/null | grep -E '^mcpgateway/.*\.py$' | tr '\n' ' '); [ -z "$FILES" ] && echo 'No changed Python files — skipping flake8' && exit 0; echo "Running flake8 on: $FILES"; uv run flake8 $FILES -v

python.name: flake8:plugins
python.description: Flake8 PEP-8 / logic errors on changed .py files (plugins/)
cmd: FILES=$(git diff --name-only $(git merge-base HEAD origin/main)...HEAD 2>/dev/null | grep -E '^plugins/.*\.py$' | tr '\n' ' '); [ -z "$FILES" ] && echo 'No changed Python files — skipping flake8' && exit 0; echo "Running flake8 on: $FILES"; uv run flake8 $FILES -v

python.name: check-ast
cmd: FILES=$(git diff --name-only $(git merge-base HEAD origin/main)...HEAD 2>/dev/null | grep -E '^(mcpgateway|plugins)/.*\.py$' | tr '\n' ' '); [ -z "$FILES" ] && echo 'No changed Python files — skipping check-ast' && exit 0; echo "Running check-ast on: $FILES"; uv run pre-commit run check-ast --files $FILES

python.name: check-builtin-literals
python.description: Require literal syntax for empty/zero builtins
cmd: FILES=$(git diff --name-only $(git merge-base HEAD origin/main)...HEAD 2>/dev/null | grep -E '^(mcpgateway|plugins)/.*\.py$' | tr '\n' ' '); [ -z "$FILES" ] && echo 'No changed Python files — skipping check-builtin-literals' && exit 0; echo "Running check-builtin-literals on: $FILES"; uv run pre-commit run check-builtin-literals --files $FILES

python.name: check-docstring-first
python.description: Check docstring is first in module
cmd: FILES=$(git diff --name-only $(git merge-base HEAD origin/main)...HEAD 2>/dev/null | grep -E '^(mcpgateway|plugins)/.*\.py$' | tr '\n' ' '); [ -z "$FILES" ] && echo 'No changed Python files — skipping check-docstring-first' && exit 0; echo "Running check-docstring-first on: $FILES"; uv run pre-commit run check-docstring-first --files $FILES

python.name: debug-statements
python.description: Check for debugger imports and breakpoint() calls
cmd: FILES=$(git diff --name-only $(git merge-base HEAD origin/main)...HEAD 2>/dev/null | grep -E '^(mcpgateway|plugins)/.*\.py$' | tr '\n' ' '); [ -z "$FILES" ] && echo 'No changed Python files — skipping debug-statements' && exit 0; echo "Running debug-statements on: $FILES"; uv run pre-commit run debug-statements --files $FILES

python.name: name-tests-test
python.description: Verify test files start with test_
cmd: FILES=$(git diff --name-only $(git merge-base HEAD origin/main)...HEAD 2>/dev/null | grep -E '^tests/.*\.py$' | grep -v -E '^tests/(.*/)?(pages|helpers|fuzzers|scripts|fixtures|migration|utils|manual|async|load|loadtest|jmeter|client|populate)/.*\.py$' | tr '\n' ' '); [ -z "$FILES" ] && echo 'No changed test files — skipping name-tests-test' && exit 0; echo "Running name-tests-test on: $FILES"; uv run pre-commit run name-tests-test --files $FILES

python.name: pylint:mcpgateway
cmd: FILES=$(git diff --name-only $(git merge-base HEAD origin/main)...HEAD 2>/dev/null | grep -E '^mcpgateway/.*\.py$' | tr '\n' ' '); [ -z "$FILES" ] && echo 'No changed mcpgateway Python files — skipping pylint' && exit 0; echo "Running pylint on: $FILES"; uv run pylint $FILES --rcfile=.pylintrc.mcpgateway --fail-on E --fail-under=10

python.name: pylint:plugins
cmd: FILES=$(git diff --name-only $(git merge-base HEAD origin/main)...HEAD 2>/dev/null | grep -E '^plugins/.*\.py$' | tr '\n' ' '); [ -z "$FILES" ] && echo 'No changed plugins Python files — skipping pylint' && exit 0; echo "Running pylint on: $FILES"; uv run pylint $FILES --rcfile=.pylintrc.plugins --fail-on E --fail-under=10

python.name: radon:mcpgateway
cmd: uv run radon cc mcpgateway --min C --show-complexity && uv run radon mi mcpgateway --min B

python.name: radon:plugins
cmd: uv run radon cc plugins --min C --show-complexity && uv run radon mi plugins --min B

python.name: diff-cover
python.description: 95% coverage on changed lines vs origin/main (advisory)
cmd: N=$(( $(nproc) - 4 )); [ $N -lt 1 ] && N=1; uv run pytest -n $N --ignore=tests/fuzz --ignore=tests/e2e/test_entra_id_integration.py --cov=mcpgateway --cov-branch --cov-report=xml -q && uv run diff-cover coverage.xml --compare-branch=origin/main --fail-under=95

python.name: pytest:doctests
cmd: N=$(( $(nproc) - 4 )); [ $N -lt 1 ] && N=1; uv run pytest -n $N --doctest-modules mcpgateway/ --cov=mcpgateway --cov-fail-under=30 --tb=short -q

rust.name: cargo:fmt-check
rust.description: Rust formatting check on changed .rs files (all Rust projects)
cmd:
FILES=$(git diff --name-only $(git merge-base HEAD origin/main)...HEAD 2>/dev/null | grep -E '\.rs$'); [ -z "$FILES" ] && echo 'No changed Rust files — skipping cargo fmt' && exit 0;
_FAIL=0
while IFS= read -r dir; do
  echo "==> fmt: $dir"
  (cd "$dir" && cargo fmt -- --check) || _FAIL=1
done < <(find . -name 'Cargo.toml' ! -path '*/target/*' ! -path '*/.venv/*' \
  | while IFS= read -r f; do
      dir=$(dirname "$f")
      grep -q '^\[workspace\]' "$f" 2>/dev/null && echo "$dir" && continue
      find "$(dirname "$dir")" -maxdepth 1 -name 'Cargo.toml' 2>/dev/null | grep -q . || echo "$dir"
    done | sort -u)
exit $_FAIL

rust.name: cargo:clippy
rust.description: Rust Clippy lint on changed .rs files (all Rust projects)
cmd:
FILES=$(git diff --name-only $(git merge-base HEAD origin/main)...HEAD 2>/dev/null | grep -E '\.rs$'); [ -z "$FILES" ] && echo 'No changed Rust files — skipping cargo clippy' && exit 0;
_VENV=$(mktemp -d)
uv venv "$_VENV" --python python3
_FAIL=0
while IFS= read -r dir; do
  echo "==> clippy: $dir"
  (cd "$dir" && PYO3_PYTHON="$_VENV/bin/python" cargo clippy -- -D warnings) || _FAIL=1
done < <(find . -name 'Cargo.toml' ! -path '*/target/*' ! -path '*/.venv/*' \
  | while IFS= read -r f; do
      dir=$(dirname "$f")
      grep -q '^\[workspace\]' "$f" 2>/dev/null && echo "$dir" && continue
      find "$(dirname "$dir")" -maxdepth 1 -name 'Cargo.toml' 2>/dev/null | grep -q . || echo "$dir"
    done | sort -u)
rm -rf "$_VENV"
exit $_FAIL

rust.name: cargo:test
cmd:
_VENV=$(mktemp -d)
uv venv "$_VENV" --python python3
_FAIL=0
while IFS= read -r dir; do
  echo "==> test: $dir"
  (cd "$dir" && PYO3_PYTHON="$_VENV/bin/python" cargo test) || _FAIL=1
done < <(find . -name 'Cargo.toml' ! -path '*/target/*' ! -path '*/.venv/*' \
  | while IFS= read -r f; do
      dir=$(dirname "$f")
      grep -q '^\[workspace\]' "$f" 2>/dev/null && echo "$dir" && continue
      find "$(dirname "$dir")" -maxdepth 1 -name 'Cargo.toml' 2>/dev/null | grep -q . || echo "$dir"
    done | sort -u)
rm -rf "$_VENV"
exit $_FAIL

rust.name: cargo:audit
rust.description: Rust security audit (all Rust projects, advisory)
cmd:
_FAIL=0
while IFS= read -r dir; do
  echo "==> audit: $dir"
  (cd "$dir" && cargo audit) || _FAIL=1
done < <(find . -name 'Cargo.toml' ! -path '*/target/*' ! -path '*/.venv/*' \
  | while IFS= read -r f; do
      dir=$(dirname "$f")
      grep -q '^\[workspace\]' "$f" 2>/dev/null && echo "$dir" && continue
      find "$(dirname "$dir")" -maxdepth 1 -name 'Cargo.toml' 2>/dev/null | grep -q . || echo "$dir"
    done | sort -u)
exit $_FAIL

rust.name: maturin:build
cmd: _VENV=$(mktemp -d) && uv venv "$_VENV" --python python3 && (cd plugins_rust && PYO3_PYTHON="$_VENV/bin/python" maturin build --release --out dist); _EC=$?; rm -rf "$_VENV"; exit $_EC

rust.name: rust:test-python
rust.description: Python integration tests for Rust extension (plugins_rust/)
cmd: cd plugins_rust && make dev && uv run make test-python

rust.name: rust:test-differential
cmd: cd plugins_rust && uv run make test-differential

rust.name: tools-rust:licenses
cmd: cd tools_rust/wrapper && cargo install cargo-deny --quiet && make licenses

ui.name: eslint
cmd: npm install --no-save eslint neostandard eslint-config-prettier eslint-plugin-prettier prettier && npx eslint --fix 'mcpgateway/static/*.js'

ui.name: htmlhint
cmd: [ -d node_modules ] || npm ci; FILES=$(git diff --name-only $(git merge-base HEAD origin/main)...HEAD 2>/dev/null | grep -E '^mcpgateway/templates/.*\.html$' | tr '\n' ' '); [ -z "$FILES" ] && echo 'No changed HTML files — skipping htmlhint' && exit 0; echo "Running htmlhint on: $FILES"; npx htmlhint $FILES

ui.name: stylelint
cmd: [ -d node_modules ] || npm ci; FILES=$(git diff --name-only $(git merge-base HEAD origin/main)...HEAD 2>/dev/null | grep -E '^mcpgateway/static/.*\.css$' | tr '\n' ' '); [ -z "$FILES" ] && echo 'No changed CSS files — skipping stylelint' && exit 0; echo "Running stylelint on: $FILES"; npx stylelint $FILES

ui.name: jshint
cmd: [ -d node_modules ] || npm ci; FILES=$(git diff --name-only $(git merge-base HEAD origin/main)...HEAD 2>/dev/null | grep -E '^mcpgateway/static/.*\.js$' | tr '\n' ' '); [ -z "$FILES" ] && echo 'No changed JS files — skipping jshint' && exit 0; echo "Running jshint on: $FILES"; npx jshint --config .jshintrc $FILES

ui.name: retire
cmd: [ -d node_modules ] || npm ci; npx --yes retire --path mcpgateway/static

ui.name: jscpd
cmd: [ -d node_modules ] || npm ci; npx --yes jscpd mcpgateway/static/ mcpgateway/templates/

integration.name: alembic:check
integration.description: Run alembic upgrade head against SQLite (temp file)
cmd: . ~/.venv/mcpgateway/bin/activate && set -euo pipefail && ALEMBIC='alembic -c mcpgateway/alembic.ini' && TMPDB=$(mktemp /tmp/alembic-check-XXXXXX.db) && trap 'rm -f "$TMPDB"' EXIT && echo '==> SQLite: alembic upgrade head' && DATABASE_URL="sqlite:///$TMPDB" $ALEMBIC upgrade head 2>&1 | tail -5 && echo 'SQLite: OK'

integration.name: alembic:upgrade
integration.description: Database migration upgrade validation (SQLite + PostgreSQL, docker-managed)

integration.name: playwright:smoke
integration.description: Playwright UI smoke tests — mirrors .github/workflows/playwright.yml: make serve on :4444 then make test-ui-ci-smoke
cmd:
set -euo pipefail
cleanup() {
  _s=$?
  if [ -f /tmp/mcpgateway-ci.pid ] && kill -0 "$(cat /tmp/mcpgateway-ci.pid)" 2>/dev/null; then
    kill "$(cat /tmp/mcpgateway-ci.pid)" || true; sleep 1
  fi
  rm -f /tmp/mcpgateway-ci.pid /tmp/mcpgateway-gunicorn.lock
  if [ "$_s" -ne 0 ]; then
    echo '==> Gateway log (last 100 lines):'; tail -n 100 /tmp/mcpgateway-ci.log || true
  fi
  return 0
}
trap cleanup EXIT
cp .env.example .env 2>/dev/null || true
export TEST_BASE_URL='http://127.0.0.1:4444'
export GUNICORN_WORKERS=1
export MCPGATEWAY_UI_ENABLED=true
export MCPGATEWAY_ADMIN_API_ENABLED=true
export SECURE_COOKIES=false
export FORCE_START=true
source ~/.venv/mcpgateway/bin/activate
make serve > /tmp/mcpgateway-ci.log 2>&1 &
echo $! > /tmp/mcpgateway-ci.pid
echo '==> Waiting for gateway on http://127.0.0.1:4444 ...'
for i in $(seq 1 120); do
  curl -fsS "${TEST_BASE_URL}/health" >/dev/null 2>&1 && break
  kill -0 "$(cat /tmp/mcpgateway-ci.pid)" 2>/dev/null || { echo 'Gateway exited during startup'; exit 1; }
  sleep 1
done
curl -fsS "${TEST_BASE_URL}/health" >/dev/null
make test-ui-ci-smoke

all.name: warn-ai-transitions
all.description: Warn about common AI transition phrases (advisory)

all.name: fix-smartquotes
all.description: Replace smart/curly quotes with ASCII quotes

all.name: fix-ligatures
all.description: Replace typographic ligatures with standard characters

all.name: fix-spaces
all.description: Normalize Unicode spaces to regular spaces

all.name: end-of-file-fixer
all.description: Ensure files end with one newline

all.name: destroyed-symlinks
all.description: Detect symlinks changed to regular files

all.name: forbid-new-submodules
all.description: Prevent addition of new git submodules

all.name: remove-crlf
all.description: Replace CRLF line endings with LF

all.name: yamllint
all.description: YAML syntax check on changed .yaml/.yml files
cmd: FILES=$(git diff --name-only $(git merge-base HEAD origin/main)...HEAD 2>/dev/null | grep -E '\.(yaml|yml)$' | tr '\n' ' '); [ -z "$FILES" ] && echo 'No changed YAML files — skipping yamllint' && exit 0; echo "Running yamllint on: $FILES"; uv run yamllint -c .yamllint $FILES

all.name: jsonlint
all.description: JSON syntax check on changed *.json files
cmd: FILES=$(git diff --name-only $(git merge-base HEAD origin/main)...HEAD 2>/dev/null | grep -E '\.json$' | grep -v '^node_modules/'); [ -z "$FILES" ] && echo 'No changed JSON files — skipping jsonlint' && exit 0; echo "Running jsonlint on: $FILES"; echo "$FILES" | xargs -I{} jq empty "{}"

all.name: tomllint
all.description: TOML syntax check on changed *.toml files
cmd: FILES=$(git diff --name-only $(git merge-base HEAD origin/main)...HEAD 2>/dev/null | grep -E '\.toml$' | grep -v '^plugin_templates/' | grep -v '^mcp-servers/templates/'); [ -z "$FILES" ] && echo 'No changed TOML files — skipping tomllint' && exit 0; echo "Running tomllint on: $FILES"; echo "$FILES" | xargs -I{} tomlcheck "{}"

all.name: verify-package
cmd: uv run twine check dist/* && uv run check-manifest && uv run pyroma -d .
